changes.before: Not at him. At the councillors who could hear a city count its dead and still answer with orders, vote counts, and exile articles.
changes.after: The anger was for the councillors who could hear casualty lists from a whole city and still answer with orders, vote counts, and exile articles.

changes.before: Jaina did not pace. She stood in the open and spoke into the light with the rigid economy of someone delivering news already past discussion.
changes.after: Jaina stood in the open and spoke into the light with the rigid economy of someone delivering news already past discussion.

changes.before: That earned the smallest sound from her. Not laughter. Close enough.
changes.after: That earned the smallest sound from her, close enough to laughter.

changes.before: Bodies had gone that way. The answer had not.
changes.after: Bodies had gone that way. The source lay north.

changes.before: Vereesa's eyes flicked over the camp: notes, mage, horses, the working shape of a mission the Convocation had hoped to catch before it hardened.
changes.after: Vereesa's eyes flicked over the camp: notes, mage, horses, the working shape of a mission the councillors had sent her south to interrupt before it hardened.

changes.before: The habit died before it reached her mouth.
changes.after: She stopped the dry answer before she spoke it.

changes.before: "The relay line dies at the harbors," she said.
changes.after: "The relay line ends at the harbors," she said.

changes.before: One tried to escape under a crate and she caught it against her boot.
changes.after: One slid under a crate and she caught it against her boot.

changes.before: Once she closed her eyes for three breaths and opened them with the hard look she wore when a line of thought chose the worst possible time to sharpen.
changes.after: Once she closed her eyes for three breaths and opened them with the hard look she wore when she reached an answer at the worst possible time to do it.

changes.before: Enough that Vereesa had to tilt her head back a little.
changes.after: Enough that Vereesa had to tilt her head back.

changes.before: That was all Sylvanas could know. It was enough.
changes.after: That was all Sylvanas could know.

changes.before: Jaina after that, a little slower through saddle soreness but with no wasted motion, already falling into the place the formation had made for her long ago and only now chosen aloud.
changes.after: Jaina after that, slower through saddle soreness but with no wasted motion, already falling into the place the formation had made for her long ago and only now chosen aloud.

changes.before: Family in the face. Institution in the kit.
